subject: Art and Design
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Encourage learners to interact and engage critically during the analytical stages
topics: Expected standard: Artwork showing prominent use of one or more of the Art principles
assessment: This subtopic looked at art principles as guidelines which are used to arrange the art elements
and these are called art principles (balance, proportion, rhythm, harmony, space…).
